  "claims": [
    "AB 2288 strengthens worker protection by allowing injunctive relief under the Private Attorneys General Act (PAGA).",
    "Injunctive relief in PAGA claims enables courts to order employers to quickly correct and remediate workplace violations.",
    "Injunctive relief could have expedited policy changes by allowing courts to direct employers like Google to change practices.",
    "Forced arbitration agreements prevent employees from filing class actions for injunctive relief.",
